name: CDIF Core metadata
abstract: Definition of metadata elements that are required for CDIF core metadata. Defines properties: @id, @type, schema:name, schema:identifier, schema:dateModified, schema:conditionsOfAccess, schema:license, schema:url, schema:distribution, schema:subjectOf. Uses building blocks: labeledLink (schemaorgProperties), identifier (schemaorgProperties), definedTerm (schemaorgProperties), dataDownload (schemaorgProperties), webAPI (schemaorgProperties), cdifCatalogRecord (cdifProperties).

sources.title: Cross Domain Interoperability Framework Discovery Profile
